hero.title: Proper treatment,
hero.subtitle: We offer the latest medical innovations with advanced technology and extensive experience. Medical service worthy of the Premium name.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Premium Clinic & Hospital
about.description: Premium Clinic LLC was established on April 24, 2013 and operates under license number 084718. Located in a modern 6-story building at 25B Asif Maharramov str., Nasimi district, Baku. Equipped with modern medical equipment from Germany, Italy, and Turkey.
about.descriptionFull: The clinic courtyard features individual parking spaces and a cafeteria for patients and relatives. The 6-story building features central cooling, heating systems, medical gas systems, and international standard ventilation. Three modern surgical blocks, a sterilization unit, and a resuscitation department operate alongside outpatient services.
about.missionText: Accuracy, precision, compassionate care — our core values. We utilize the latest medical achievements and technologies.
about.visionText: To provide international-standard premium medical services to the population.
about.valuesText: Accuracy, precision, compassionate care, and quality treatment.
about.equipment: Our equipment is sourced from Germany, Italy, Turkey, USA, and Japan.
